_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Sideways BTC momentum and conflicting institutional flows keep price pinned in Complacency until the stablecoin powder keg either ignites or ETF divergence breaks the structure.
next_move.brains_agree: No — narrative leans toward imminent reversal/coiling breakout while analyst holds flat; consensus sides with the analyst's higher trust weight and stricter phase anchoring.
